caption: The video features a presentation at EuroPython 2018 in Edinburgh, focusing on Crypto-ML Ltd., a company that aims to capitalize on the 2017 crypto-craze. The presenter, dressed in a suit and standing behind a podium, gestures enthusiastically while explaining the company's mission. The slide displayed highlights their goal of "jumping the hype-train" by developing a large-scale crypto-analysis platform. This platform involves heavy compute data analysis, transformation, and fetching, with a focus on deep running predictions using Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) networks. The presenter appears confident and engaged, suggesting a detailed discussion on how the company plans to navigate and potentially thrive in the volatile world of cryptocurrency.
